candidate.name: Europe PMC RESTful Web Service
candidate.butler_skill_shape: biomedical literature retrieval, abstract fetch, grant and preprint monitoring
why_recommended: Strong specialist source for biomedical and life-science research.
Good complement to Crossref and Semantic Scholar when domain specificity matters.
risks: Domain-specific. Not necessary for a general research bundle.
Needs a separate retrieval profile from CS-first sources like arXiv.
